Package index

All functions

PeakGuideR PeakGuideR-package
PeakGuideR
adduct_candidates()
Detects adduct pairwise candidates
adduct_families()
Build neutral-mass-based adduct families from pairwise adduct candidate edges
build_feature_summary()
Build feature-level summary from PeakGuideR relations
build_neutral_mass_candidates()
Build neutral-mass candidate table
build_relation_table()
Build a unified peak relation table
cardinal_to_peakmatrix()
Convert a Cardinal MSImagingExperiment object to a peak matrix
cir_score()
CIR score #' Validate C13 M+1 candidates using carbon isotope ratios
cir_table
CIR theoretical lookup table (100-1200 Da)
default_adducts()
Default adduct definitions
eips_n_table
EIPS elemental isotope-pattern reference table
eips_score()
Score elemental isotope-pattern candidates
eips_table
EIPS theoretical lookup table
example_pkm
Example PeakGuideR peak matrix
iso_mass_deviation_score()
Mass deviation scoring for isotopic candidate pairs
iso_morphology_candidates()
Detect isotope candidates using mass differences and ion-image morphology
load_compound_mass_database()
Load the PeakGuideR compound mass database
load_peakguider_databases()
Load external PeakGuideR databases
load_standards_adduct_library()
Load the PeakGuideR standard adduct library
plot_peak_network()
Plot a peak evidence network
print(<peakguider_workflow>)
Print PeakGuideR workflow result
run_peakguider_workflow()
Run the PeakGuideR annotation workflow

Developed by Nadia Molto.
